name: MCP for Argo CD
what_it_does: MCP server that enables AI assistants to interact with Argo CD for GitOps deployment management. Provides 12 tools covering application lifecycle (list, get, create, update, delete, sync) and resource management (resource tree, managed resources, workload logs, resource events, resource actions). Supports stdio and HTTP stream transports, with an optional read-only mode.
use_cases: List and inspect Argo CD applications through natural language
Trigger application syncs and monitor deployment status via AI assistant
View resource trees and managed resources for Argo CD applications
Access pod and deployment logs through conversational interface
Create and update Argo CD applications programmatically via MCP
Run resource-level actions on Kubernetes resources managed by Argo CD
not_for: Direct Kubernetes management without Argo CD
CI pipeline management (this is CD only)
Helm or Kustomize operations outside Argo CD context
Cluster administration tasks not exposed by Argo CD API
best_when: You manage Argo CD deployments and want AI-assisted application management, troubleshooting, and deployment operations through natural language.
avoid_when: You don't use Argo CD, or you need direct Kubernetes API access without the Argo CD abstraction layer.

auth.notes: Requires ARGOCD_BASE_URL and ARGOCD_API_TOKEN environment variables. Token is generated from Argo CD instance. Supports NODE_TLS_REJECT_UNAUTHORIZED for self-signed certs.

pricing.notes: Apache-2.0 licensed. Part of argoproj-labs organization. Requires existing Argo CD instance.

agent_readiness.error_message_notes: Well-structured TypeScript codebase from argoproj-labs. Read-only mode (MCP_READ_ONLY) provides good safety guardrail.
agent_readiness.idempotency_notes: Read operations are idempotent. Sync and create operations are not inherently idempotent but align with Argo CD's own idempotency behavior.
known_agent_gotchas: Write operations (create, update, delete, sync) can affect production deployments -- use MCP_READ_ONLY for safety
Requires valid Argo CD API token with appropriate RBAC permissions
Resource actions execute directly on Kubernetes resources -- high blast radius

security_score_components.security_notes: ArgoCD GitOps CD MCP. API token with project/app scopes. ArgoCD manages production deployments — high blast radius. Use read-only token for observation, separate write token for sync.
